name: pf2-party-codex
description: Archive-first TTRPG campaign workspace with MongoDB source of truth, GM/Player portals, and invitation-based campaign access.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev --workspace apps/server" "npm run dev --workspace apps/web"
scripts.check:syntax: find apps/server/src apps/server/scripts scripts tests -type f \( -name '*.js' -o -name '*.mjs' \) -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check
scripts.verify: npm test && npm run build && npm run check:syntax && npm run audit:production
